text: Code reviews are a vital part of software development. When developers share their code before it goes live, team members can check for errors, which helps in catching bugs early. This saves time and money, as it is much easier to fix a small issue than a major problem later. Beyond finding mistakes, code reviews encourage knowledge sharing. Junior developers learn new techniques from senior team members, while everyone gets a clearer understanding of the codebase. Ultimately, this process raises team quality. It builds a culture of collaboration, accountability, and continuous improvement, making the whole team stronger and more reliable.
